𝗣𝗟𝗔𝗜𝗡-𝗔𝗣𝗣 | Securely managing and accessing an Android phone's data and features from a web browser on the same local network, without relying on cloud services.  🔥 Super Hot!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Securely managing and accessing an Android phone's data and features from a web browser on the same local network, without relying on cloud services.
📅 Created: Oct 2021 • Updated: Apr 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Web-based phone management dashboard
✅ Local-only operation (no cloud)
✅ End-to-end encryption (TLS + XChaCha20-Poly1305)
✅ File browsing, upload, download
✅ Media viewing and streaming
✅ Contact and SMS management
✅ Screen mirroring with remote control
✅ Built-in tools: Markdown notes, RSS reader, media player, P2P chat


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 237 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 52 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PlainApp is an open-source Android application that provides a self-hosted, web-based interface for managing your phone's files, media, contacts, SMS, and more from any device on the same network. It prioritizes privacy and security with local-only operation and end-to-end encryption.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/plainhub/plain-app

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔥 𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝘂𝘀 for daily GitHub projects!
👉 GitHub Open Source: https://t.me/GitHub_Open_Source

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇


🏷️ 𝗧𝗔𝗚𝗦
#android #android_app #compose #compose_ui #f_droid

𝗗𝗘𝗕-𝗚𝗘𝗧 | Managing .deb packages from third-party sources that are not available in official repositories, simplifying software installation and updates on Debian-based systems.  🔥 Super Hot!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Managing .deb packages from third-party sources that are not available in official repositories, simplifying software installation and updates on Debian-based systems.
📅 Created: Apr 2022 • Updated: Apr 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Install .deb packages from GitHub releases or direct download URLs
✅ Update and upgrade packages installed via deb-get
✅ Search for available applications
✅ Remove and purge packages
✅ Support for GitHub Personal Access Tokens for API authorization
✅ Works on Debian, Ubuntu, and derivatives


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 159 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 114 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

deb-get is a command-line tool that extends apt-get functionality to manage .deb packages published via GitHub releases or direct downloads. It simplifies the installation, upgrade, and removal of software not available in standard Ubuntu/Debian repositories.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/wimpysworld/deb-get

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗡𝗘𝗧𝗪𝗔𝗧𝗖𝗛 | Real-time network monitoring and troubleshooting directly within the terminal, providing both a broad overview and detailed packet-level insights.  🔥 Super Hot!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Real-time network monitoring and troubleshooting directly within the terminal, providing both a broad overview and detailed packet-level insights.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time network diagnostics
✅ Terminal-based interface (TUI)
✅ Interface statistics with sparklines
✅ Connection monitoring with process names and PIDs
✅ Gateway and DNS health checks with latency heatmap
✅ Packet capture and analysis (Wireshark-like)
✅ Flight recorder for transient event capture
✅ Incident bundle export (summary, connections, health, bandwidth, DNS, alerts, packets)


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 44 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

NetWatch is a real-time network diagnostics tool for the terminal, offering instant visibility into network interfaces, connections, and packet data. It provides both high-level overviews and deep packet inspection capabilities, along with a flight recorder feature to capture transient network events.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/matthart1983/netwatch

𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗦 | Building and deploying AI agents to automate trading on Polymarket prediction markets.  ✨ Notable!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Building and deploying AI agents to automate trading on Polymarket prediction markets.
📅 Created: Jul 2024 • Updated: Apr 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Integration with Polymarket API
✅ AI agent utilities for prediction markets
✅ Local and remote RAG support
✅ Data sourcing from betting services, news providers, and web search
✅ Comprehensive LLM tools for prompt engineering


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 735 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 22 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Polymarket Agents is a Python-based developer framework for building AI agents that can autonomously trade on the Polymarket prediction market platform. It provides tools for integrating with the Polymarket API, sourcing data, and utilizing LLMs for market predictions and trade execution.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Polymarket/agents
